user_story: As an HR admin, I want a central Configuration hub that groups all HRMS settings by area, so that I can quickly find the setup screen I need
acceptance_criteria: Given I open the Configuration screen; When the page loads; Then I see grouped setup areas such as Organization, Employee Management, Recruitment and Attendance Tracking

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure Organization settings such as Localization, Head Office, Location, Department and Role, so that the company structure is defined for the HRMS
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Configuration screen; When I open the Organization section; Then I can access settings for Localization, Head Office, Location, Department and Role

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure Employee Management options like Access Permissions, Joining Checklist and User Defined Fields, so that employee records and onboarding are governed correctly
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Configuration screen; When I open the Employee Management section; Then I can access Employee Access Permission, Employee Joining Checklist and User Defined Fields

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set up Recruitment configuration such as Interview Rounds, Interview Panels and Offer Approvers, so that the hiring workflow follows company policy
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Configuration screen; When I open the Recruitment section; Then I can access Interview Rounds, Interview Panels and Offer Approvers

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure Attendance Tracking options like Tracking Mode, Break, Rule and Work From Home Settings, so that attendance is captured according to policy
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Configuration screen; When I open the Attendance Tracking section; Then I can access Tracking Mode, Break, Rule and Work From Home Settings

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure Leave Management including Paid Time Off, Holiday Calendar and Time Off Approvers, so that leave policies are enforced consistently
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Configuration screen; When I open the Leave Management section; Then I can access Paid Time Off, Holiday Calendar and Time Off Approvers

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure Exit Management including Exit Questionnaire, Exit Tasks and Exit Approvers, so that employee offboarding is handled properly
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Configuration screen; When I open the Exit Management section; Then I can access Exit Questionnaire, Exit Tasks and Exit Approvers

user_story: As a System admin, I want to manage integrations and alerts such as Acumatica Integration, Wrike Integration and Configure Alerts, so that the HRMS connects to external systems and notifies users
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Configuration screen; When I open the integrations and Alerts sections; Then I can access Acumatica Integration, Wrike Integration and Configure Alerts

user_story: As a System admin, I want to import data and review the Import Data Log, so that I can load records in bulk and audit the results
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Configuration screen; When I open Data Transactions; Then I can use Import Data and view the Import Data Log
